nasb.text: So Jacob came close to Isaac his father, and he felt him and said, “The voice is the voice of Jacob, but the hands are the hands of Esau.”

esv.text: So Jacob went near to Isaac his father, who felt him and said, “The voice is Jacob’s voice, but the hands are the hands of Esau.”

cnv.text: 雅各就走近他父親以撒身邊，以撒摸著他，說：“聲音是雅各的聲音，手卻是以掃的手。”

ccb.text: 雅各挨到父亲跟前，以撒摸着他说：“声音是雅各的声音，手却是以扫的手。”

csbs.text: 雅各就靠近他父亲以撒。以撒摸着他，说：“声音是雅各的声音，手却是以扫的手。”
